# Build My First HubSpot Feature

Use this prompt with any AI coding tool:

```text
Read this repository first, especially START_WITH_AI.md, AGENTS.md, docs/start-here.md, docs/choose-your-path.md, and docs/security-for-non-developers.md.

I want to build my first real HubSpot feature from this starter. Ask me one question at a time. Start with mock data. Do not ask me to paste secrets or customer data.

Create a short blueprint before editing code. Then make the smallest working version and tell me how to run the local check.
```
